q: Do you book rooms that have good views when you go travelling?
examiner_note: Giám khảo muốn biết về thói quen du lịch và ưu tiên về chi phí của bạn. Bạn có thể nói rằng mình sẵn sàng chi thêm tiền (extra cost) để có một 'view xịn', hoặc bạn là người thích tiết kiệm vì dành phần lớn thời gian ở ngoài. Hãy sử dụng các thuật ngữ chuyên ngành khách sạn như 'ocean-facing', 'balcony', 'premium' để tăng điểm Lexical Resource.

band7.text: Yes, I usually do. Even if it costs a bit more, having a room with a view—like overlooking the ocean or a city skyline—makes the whole travel experience much more enjoyable and relaxing for me. It’s worth the extra money.
band7.note: Trả lời trực tiếp, giải thích được lý do tại sao lại chọn phòng có view (enjoyable, relaxing). Sử dụng tốt cụm từ 'worth the extra money'.

band8.text: It depends on the nature of the trip, but generally, I’m willing to splurge on a room with a scenic vista. Waking up to a breathtaking view of the mountains or the sea can significantly enhance the holiday vibe. However, if I’m on a budget trip where I’ll be out all day, then a good view becomes less of a priority for me.
band8.note: Cấu trúc câu phức hợp, sử dụng từ vựng linh hoạt (splurge, scenic vista, significantly enhance, budget trip, priority). Thể hiện được sự cân nhắc giữa các yếu tố.

band9.text: Whenever my budget permits, I prioritize booking accommodations that boast an impressive outlook. I find that a well-positioned room with a balcony overlooking a landmark or a natural wonder adds a layer of tranquility to the entire excursion. That being said, I’m also a pragmatist; if the premium for a 'room with a view' is exorbitant, I’d rather allocate those funds towards experiential activities or local culinary explorations.
band9.note: Từ vựng cực kỳ học thuật và chính xác (prioritize, boast, impressive outlook, tranquility, excursion, pragmatist, premium, exorbitant, allocate). Cách lập luận rất thực tế và tinh tế.

v.meaning: vung tiền vào cái gì đó
v.example: I decided to splurge on a luxury hotel for my anniversary.
The resort offers a scenic vista of the emerald bay.

v.meaning: nâng cao bầu không khí/cảm giác
v.example: Live music really helps to enhance the vibe of the restaurant.
Traveling on a budget requires careful planning and research.
Safety is always our number one priority.
We need to find cheap accommodation for our trip to London.

v.meaning: sở hữu cái gì đó đáng tự hào
v.example: The hotel boasts two swimming pools and a world-class spa.
The office on the 40th floor has an impressive outlook over the harbor.
I love the tranquility of the mountains in winter.
We went on a day excursion to a nearby island.
As a pragmatist, she doesn't like to spend money on things she doesn't need.
You have to pay a premium for a room facing the sea.
The prices at that restaurant are absolutely exorbitant.
The government needs to allocate more funds to education.
I always try to get an ocean-facing room when at the beach.

v.meaning: tầm nhìn hướng ra thành phố
v.example: A city-view room is spectacular at night with all the lights.
I enjoy having my coffee on the hotel balcony.
The suite has floor-to-ceiling windows with amazing views.
The hotel offers many amenities including a gym and a rooftop bar.
Standard check-in time is usually after 2 PM.
They offered us a free upgrade to a suite because it was our honeymoon.
I'm sorry, we have no vacancy for tonight.
Most hotels in the city are fully booked during the festival.
The scenery in Switzerland is absolutely stunning.
The Eiffel Tower is the most famous landmark in France.
The Great Barrier Reef is a magnificent natural wonder.
We have a very tight itinerary for our trip to Japan.
Her wanderlust has taken her to over fifty countries.

v.meaning: lòng hiếu khách/ngành dịch vụ khách sạn
v.example: The hotel is famous for its warm hospitality.

v.meaning: làm trẻ lại/hồi phục sức khỏe
v.example: A relaxing holiday is the best way to rejuvenate your mind.

v.meaning: trốn khỏi cuộc sống xô bồ
v.example: I go to the countryside to escape the rat race for a few days.
I prefer traveling to places that are off the beaten track.
Homestays provide a great opportunity for cultural immersion.

v.meaning: tận dụng tối đa cái gì đó
v.example: We want to make the most of our limited time in Paris.
This hotel offers excellent value for money.
She had to scrimp and save for a whole year to afford the trip.
It's much easier to move around if you travel light.
We spent the whole day sightseeing in Rome.

v.meaning: viên ngọc ẩn (nơi đẹp mà ít người biết)
v.example: This small village is a real hidden gem.
I bought a small model of the statue as a souvenir.

v.meaning: nơi bẫy khách du lịch (giá cao, không đặc sắc)
v.example: Don't buy anything in that area; it's a typical tourist trap.

v.meaning: điểm dừng chân (trong chuyến bay dài)
v.example: We had a six-hour layover in Singapore.
I started feeling homesick after two weeks abroad.

v.meaning: người đi du lịch khắp thế giới
v.example: He's a famous globetrotter who documents his life online.

v.meaning: sự mệt mỏi sau chuyến bay dài (lệch múi giờ)
v.example: It took me a few days to get over my jet lag.
Hotel prices are much higher during the high season.
You can find great deals if you travel during the low season.

v.meaning: ngành công nghiệp dịch vụ khách sạn
v.example: She wants to build a career in the hospitality industry.
The island is very popular with young backpackers.

v.meaning: khám phá ẩm thực địa phương
v.example: I love going on local culinary explorations when I visit a new city.
